Installation¶

Stable release¶

To install Perturbation to Hubbard Model, run this command in your terminal:

uv add Perturbation-to-Hubbard-Model

Or if you prefer to use pip:

pip install Perturbation-to-Hubbard-Model

From source¶

The source files for Perturbation to Hubbard Model can be downloaded from the Github repo.

You can either clone the public repository:

git clone https://github.com/MyaBird/Perturbation-to-Hubbard-Model

Or download the tarball:

curl -OJL https://github.com/MyaBird/Perturbation-to-Hubbard-Model/tarball/main

Once you have a copy of the source, you can install it with:

cd Perturbation-to-Hubbard-Model
uv sync

Perturbation to Hubbard Model
